meta.title: KplaWY — Never miss the play
meta.description: The first real-world instant replay app. Continuously records in the background and saves the last seconds with a single tap.
meta.ogTitle: KplaWY — Instant Replay for the Real World
meta.ogDescription: Record continuously. Save the past. Never miss the play.

hero.headline: Record the present. Save the moment that just happened.
hero.subheadline: KplaWY keeps the last seconds in a configurable continuous buffer and turns any real-world play into a saved replay with one tap on your phone, watch, or Bluetooth trigger.
hero.proof2: Apple Watch, Galaxy Watch, and Bluetooth

evidence.title: This is not concept work. The product already exists, works, and shows up on screen.
evidence.subtitle: I used real app and watch screenshots to increase credibility, reduce abstraction, and reinforce that KplaWY earns value through concrete use, not vague promise.
evidence.videoTitle: Replay captured in a real scenario with the product's actual visual identity.
evidence.videoText: The video acts as proof of context: sport, fast action, and replay captured with KplaWY's own visual language.
evidence.card1Title: Remote control with a real interface
evidence.card1Text: This shows the product goes beyond the main camera and already delivers a serious remote operation layer.
evidence.card2Title: Clip library ready for repeat use
evidence.card2Text: The clips screen reinforces organization, backup, and product maturity. That increases trust and makes the software feel complete.
evidence.card3Title: Replay on the watch, not a fake mockup
evidence.card3Text: The smartwatch image proves instant convenience and helps communicate the remote trigger advantage without relying only on copy.

trust.intro: The product becomes more valuable when it removes friction at the decisive moment. Everything here is designed for that.
trust.item4Desc: optional backup when you want it

features.title: It does not ask you to predict the play. It keeps replay ready beforehand.
features.subtitle: KplaWY is not valuable because it records video. It is valuable because it removes late reaction, reduces improvisation, and increases the chance that you leave with the moment saved.
features.asideText: This is not about filming more. It is about having a smarter flow when the best moment happens too fast.
features.card1Title: Your video usually starts too late.
features.card1Desc: When something incredible happens, you react like a person, not like a camera operator. By the time you try to record, the best part is already gone.
features.card1Point1: You live the moment before reaching for your phone.
features.card1Point2: Normal recording demands prediction or luck.
features.card2Title: The recent past is already armed and ready to save.
features.card2Desc: The circular buffer, with configurable duration, keeps the previous play available without filling your storage with hours of useless footage.
features.card2Point1: Less panic to hit record in time.
features.card2Point2: More chances to preserve what actually matters.
features.card3Title: Trigger it from whatever place makes the most sense.
features.card3Desc: Phone, Apple Watch, Galaxy Watch, Bluetooth button, or another phone with live preview. The product adapts to your real routine.
features.card3Point1: Less friction when the phone is not in your hand.
features.card3Point2: Better for tripods, training, sports, and remote content.
features.card3Point3: More consistent capture in real use.
features.card4Title: Strong privacy. High quality. Less improvisation.
features.card4Desc: From SD to UHD with HEVC, footage stored on-device, and optional Google Drive backup. It feels premium because it was designed like a serious product.
features.card4Point1: No analytics, no ads, no tracking.
features.card4Point2: Fine control over camera and audio.
features.card4Point3: Multi-camera and stats when you need more.

howItWorks.title: From action to replay in seconds.
howItWorks.subtitle: The experience is designed to disappear. Frame it once and only act when the moment deserves to be saved.
howItWorks.note: Recording and saving work offline. Internet only matters when you choose login, subscription, or backup.
howItWorks.step1Title: Open it, frame it, and let it run.
howItWorks.step1Desc: KplaWY enters continuous mode and keeps the last seconds available in memory at all times, with adjustable duration inside the app.
howItWorks.step2Title: Stop thinking about recording every second.
howItWorks.step2Desc: You stay present while the buffer quietly renews itself in the background and keeps replay armed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Tap on the phone, watch, or remote trigger and turn the moment that just happened into a saved clip.

pricing.title: One premium product. Two clear ways to pay.
pricing.subtitle: Start on Free and choose Premium in the format that fits your routine best. Subscription happens inside the app.
pricing.freeDesc: Perfect for getting to know the experience, using manual replay, and validating whether the product already solves your context.
pricing.freeNote: You can upgrade to Premium anytime without losing the flow you already learned.
pricing.premiumDesc: For people who want remote capture, more control, better organization, and more value per replay saved.
pricing.monthlyNote: Flexible if you want to start right now.
pricing.upfrontNote: Best value for people who use it consistently.
pricing.valueHeadline: Annual upfront delivers the strongest perceived value with the least friction for continuous use.
pricing.saveVsMonthly: Save R$ 108,90 versus monthly across 12 months.
pricing.premiumMeta1: Subscription and billing are handled inside the app.
pricing.premiumMeta2: Prices are shown in BRL with zero ambiguity.
pricing.pricingFootnote: Premium is available as monthly or annual upfront.
pricing.premiumCta: Get the app and choose plan

cta.title: When the play happens, replay should already be ready.
cta.subtitle: Download KplaWY, choose your plan, and turn late reaction into a saved replay.

footer.description: Instant replay for the real world, with continuous capture, total privacy, and more control when timing matters.
footer.madeWith: Built for people who refuse to lose the best play.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.headline: Every detail matters.
featuresPage.subtitle: Discover everything KplaWY offers to ensure you never miss what matters.
featuresPage.recF1Desc: The app continuously records into a circular buffer in the device's RAM. Replay duration is configurable inside the app, without consuming storage with continuous recording.
featuresPage.recF2Desc: Choose between SD, HD, Full HD, and UHD. Configure FPS, bitrate, and codec (H.264 or HEVC) for the perfect balance between quality and performance.
featuresPage.recF3Desc: Switch between cameras with a single tap. Support for multiple rear lenses with optical zoom (0.5x, 1x, 2x) and digital pinch-to-zoom.
featuresPage.recF4Desc: Configure audio source, input device, and mixing volume. Monitor audio status in real-time through the HUD.
featuresPage.remF1Desc: One tap on your wrist and the replay is saved. Visual and haptic feedback confirm the play was captured.
featuresPage.remF2Desc: Compatible with Galaxy Watch via Wearable Data Layer. Identical interface to Apple Watch with clear visual states.
featuresPage.remF3Desc: Connect any Bluetooth button (like AB Shutter3) to trigger replays. Perfect for tripod and hands-free recording.
featuresPage.remF4Desc: Use another phone as a remote control with real-time preview of the main camera. See the framing and trigger replay from a distance.
featuresPage.manF1Desc: All your replays organized by date. Search, filter by duration or camera, mark favorites, and share.
featuresPage.manF2Desc: Play frame by frame, adjust speed from 0.25x to 2x, skip forward and backward 5 seconds.
featuresPage.manF3Desc: Automatic backup of your clips to Google Drive. Smart organization by date. Access from any device.
featuresPage.manF4Desc: Track how many replays you've saved, total recording time, storage usage, and distribution by camera.
featuresPage.expF1Desc: Adaptive interface with dark theme (pure black) and light theme (pure white). The same premium experience in any lighting condition.
featuresPage.expF2Desc: Camera overlays with essential information that automatically disappear after 5 seconds to avoid distraction.
featuresPage.expF3Desc: Dims the preview to save battery during long recordings, with slide-to-unlock gesture to reactivate.
featuresPage.expF4Desc: No data leaves your device without your permission. No analytics, no tracking, no ads. Your moments are yours alone.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.headline: Born from a missed play.
aboutPage.story1: It all started with a goal nobody filmed. That perfect moment that existed for a second — and disappeared forever.
aboutPage.story2: KplaWY was born from that frustration. From the idea that technology should let us save what already happened, not just what's to come.
aboutPage.story3: We built an app that works as a personal DVR. It continuously records in the background, keeping the last seconds always ready with configurable duration. When the moment happens, you do not need to have reacted in time — just hit replay.
aboutPage.story4: Every detail of KplaWY was designed for those who live the moment and don't want to rely on luck to capture it.
aboutPage.missionText: Ensure that no important moment is ever lost. Never again.
aboutPage.val1Text: Your videos never leave your device without your permission.
aboutPage.val2Text: One button. One tap. Play saved.
aboutPage.val3Text: Native high-performance technology on iOS and Android.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.headline: Questions? We're here.
faqPage.a1: KplaWY is a real-world instant replay app. It continuously records into a configurable circular buffer in the device's memory. When something important happens, you press a button and the last seconds are saved as a permanent clip.
faqPage.q2: Does the app use a lot of storage?
faqPage.a2: No. The circular buffer records to RAM, not storage. Only the replays you save take up space on the device.
faqPage.q3: Can I use my Apple Watch or Galaxy Watch?
faqPage.a3: Yes. KplaWY is compatible with Apple Watch and Galaxy Watch. With one tap on your wrist, the replay is saved instantly.
faqPage.a4: Multi-Camera mode lets you connect multiple phones over the local network to record the same moment from several angles at once. It's a KplaWY Premium feature.
faqPage.q5: Are my videos sent to any server?
faqPage.a5: No. All videos stay exclusively on your device. The only external upload is the optional Google Drive backup, which goes to your own account.
faqPage.q6: Do I need internet to use the app?
faqPage.a6: No. Recording and replay work 100% offline. Internet is only needed for login, subscription, and cloud backup.
faqPage.q7: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
faqPage.a7: Free covers the essentials to get started: a continuous buffer with configurable duration, replay on your phone, unlimited clips, and smartwatch or Bluetooth triggering. Premium adds multi-camera, remote control with live preview, automatic backup, advanced statistics, and customization.
faqPage.q8: How do Premium trial and billing work?
faqPage.a8: You can try Premium features free for 7 days. After that, billing can continue as monthly at R$ 29,90 or annual upfront at R$ 249,90.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.headline: How can we help?
supportPage.subtitle: We're here to make sure your KplaWY experience is perfect.
supportPage.issue1Solution: Check that camera and microphone permissions are enabled in your device settings.
supportPage.issue2Solution: Make sure Bluetooth is active and the KplaWY app is installed on the watch. Restart both devices.
supportPage.issue3Solution: Check storage access permission. Clips are saved in the app folder and can be exported to the gallery.
supportPage.issue4Solution: Check your internet connection and if your Google account is connected. Backup can be paused on mobile data (configurable).
supportPage.contactTitle: Didn't find what you're looking for?
supportPage.contactText: Contact us by email and we'll respond as soon as possible.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.headline: Get in touch.
contactPage.subtitle: Questions, suggestions, or feedback — we'd love to hear from you.
contactPage.formError: Failed to send. Please try again.

privacyPage.metaDescription: How KplaWY collects, uses, and protects your data: email, device identifiers, and crash diagnostics (Crashlytics). LGPD/GDPR compliant.
